data.title: Arrcus sees 3x bookings growth in 2025, introduces AI-Policy Aware Arrcus Inference Network Fabric.
data.description: Arrcus, a top provider of distributed networking infrastructure based in San Jose, California, revealed a remarkable achievement today. In 2025, the company experienced an exceptional 3x increase in bookings. This growth was seen across various sectors including datacenter, telecommunications, and enterprise, with a notable demand for mission critical switching and routing applications. These applications were successfully deployed in thousands of network nodes worldwide. Customers were particularly impressed by the versatility, creativity, and rapid introduction of features in the ArcOS® network operating system and the ACE® platform. These solutions were employed across a diverse array of open networking hardware.

data.title: Europe's pioneering blockchain regulations include a sandbox for testing innovation within legal boundaries.
data.description: The European Union was an early regulator of blockchain technology compared to other leading economies. A sandbox environment has been established to assess how communication can foster innovation while adhering to legal boundaries.

data.title: Digital euro pilot provider selection starts in Q1 2026 for 12-month pilot, to launch in H2 2027. EU-licensed firms sought.
data.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) will soon start choosing EU-licensed payment providers for its digital euro trial phase, expected to commence in the second half of 2027. The pilot program will last for 12 months, marking a significant step towards the integration of digital currency within the EU.

data.title: Sompo Group partners with Guidewire to modernize operations worldwide, accelerating adoption of Guidewire Cloud Platform.
data.description: Sompo Group revealed a new deal with Guidewire Software Inc. to enhance its global use of the Guidewire Cloud Platform, solidifying their 12-year partnership. This move aligns with Sompo's goal to modernize operations and streamline decision-making across its international ventures. Through this agreement, Sompo's local entities will transfer current Guidewire applications from on-premises setups to the cloud and implement fresh solutions on the platform. The initial phase will concentrate on Sompo's global migration strategy, emphasizing cloud adoption and AI integration.

data.title: Within3 introduces Dataverse into its pharma Launch Intelligence platform, integrating real-world data to enhance decision-making.
data.description: Cleveland-based company Within3 has recently rolled out Dataverse, a new feature that incorporates actual data into its pharmaceutical Launch Intelligence™ system. This innovation aims to facilitate quicker and more informed decisions when it comes to product launches.

data.title: Propanc Biopharma reports progress on R&D programs and PRP asset for Phase 1b study in half yearly 2025/26 results.
data.description: We are excited about the progress achieved in our research and development efforts, particularly with our main product PRP. We are currently gearing up for a groundbreaking Phase 1b clinical trial, which will be the first of its kind in the world.

data.title: SEGG Media appoints Daniel Bailey to board after acquiring majority of Veloce Media Group for revenue growth.
data.description: The Co-Founder and CEO of Veloce is set to join the SEGG Board as the company experiences a surge in revenue growth. Veloce is a sports and digital media platform that has seen a significant increase in its income.

data.title: Kraig Labs (OTCQB: KBLB) nears breakthrough in spider silk production, moving towards commercial scale.
data.description: Kraig Laboratories, trading under the ticker symbol KBLB on the OTCQB market, is moving into a crucial stage as it ramps up efforts to begin large-scale production of biodegradable spider silk.

data.title: Stardust Power Inc. secures $10M financing through equity agreement with B. Riley, will raise capital over 36 months.
data.description: In Greenwich, Connecticut on February 18, 2026, Stardust Power Inc. (NASDAQ: SDST), a US-based company specializing in battery-grade lithium carbonate, disclosed securing a common equity financing of up to $10.0 million. The funding, known as the "Equity Facility," involves a common stock purchase agreement with B. Riley Principal Capital II, LLC, allowing Stardust Power to access the capital as needed within a 36-month timeframe, following standard procedures.

data.title: Xtreme One Entertainment announces XFC's return to Iowa on April 25 for XFC 54: Ascension at Xtream Arena as part of its 2026 expansion.
data.description: The popular MMA event XFC will be making a comeback in Iowa on April 25 with XFC 54: Ascension taking place at the Xtream Arena. This event is significant as it is part of XFC's national expansion plan for 2026, aiming to showcase top MMA fighters and talent. Fans can expect an action-packed night of fights featuring some of the best fighters in the sport. Be sure to mark your calendars for April 25 to catch all the excitement live at Xtream Arena.
